---
title: "Picrust"
author: "IY"
date: "2026-03-23"
output: html_document
---

```{r library, include=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(phyloseq)
library(ggpicrust2)
```
# Picrust Analysis of KO Term Data
This pipeline will be a complex analysis of the Picrust output we did on the class server.

## Input and Convert the Needed Files

Input and convert the ```phyloseq_taxonomy.rds``` sample data into a data frame and move the ```fastq``` sample IDs into a column. Then import the ```pred_metagenome_unstrat.tsv``` file.

```{r Import Data}
meta = readRDS('../datasets/ps_filtered.rds') %>% .@sam_data %>% data.frame() %>% 
  rownames_to_column('sample_name')

ko = read_delim('../datasets/picrust_output/KO_metagenome_out/pred_metagenome_unstrat.tsv')
```


## Run the Pipeline

```{r DAA}
# Rename the ko value so the first column is rownames
?column_to_rownames
# ko = column_to_rownames(read_delim('../datasets/picrust_output/KO_metagenome_out/pred_metagenome_unstrat.tsv'), var = 'function')

?str_remove
?all_of
# Filter to only compare hindgut microbiome
### HELP ###
hindgut = meta %>% filter(sample_type %in% c('hindgut'))
ko_filt = select(ko,`function`) %>% 
  mutate(`function` = sapply(.$`function`, function(x) str_split(x,'ko:') %>%
                            .[[1]] %>%
                            .[2])
    )
ko_filt

# ko_names=column_to_rownames(ko_filt, var = 'function')
# ko_names
?merge
?add_column
ko_joined = add_column(ko, ko_filt$`function`)
ko_named = column_to_rownames(ko_joined, var = 'ko_filt$`function`')
ko_selected = select(ko_named, -`function`)

# sapply(ko$`function, function(x) str_remove(x,'ko:') %>% unlist())

# Perform pathway differential abundance analysis (DAA) using LinDA method
daa_results_df = pathway_daa(abundance = ko_selected,
                             metadata = hindgut, 
                             group = "swim_performance", 
                             daa_method = "LinDA", 
                             select = NULL, reference = NULL)

saveRDS(daa_results_df, '../datasets/fish_daa_results_df.rds')
```

## Convert KO to KEGG

```{r KO to KEGG}
# Annotate pathway results using KO to KEGG conversion
# This will take a while to run as it downloads KEGG data - save as an .rds file if you want to avoid re-running it
daa_annotated_results_df = pathway_annotation(pathway = "KO",
                                              daa_results_df = daa_results_df,
                                              ko_to_kegg = TRUE)

saveRDS(daa_annotated_results_df,'../datasets/fish_daa_annotated_results_df.rds')

#daa_annotated_results_df<-readRDS(daa_annotated_results_df,'fish_daa_annotated_results_df.rds')
```


## KEGG Error Barplot - Has issues due to KEGG
```{r KEGG Plot}
source('ggpicrust2_errorbar_function_fixed.R')

daa_annotated_results_df %>% filter(p_adjust< 5e-11, abs(log2_fold_change) > 5) %>% nrow()

peb = pathway_errorbar_fixed(abundance = ko_filt, 
                     daa_results_df = daa_annotated_results_df, 
                     Group = hindgut$swim_performance, 
                     wrap_label = T, wraplength=60,
                     fc_cutoff = 5, order_by_log = F,
                     p_values_threshold = 5e-11, 
                     order = "pathway_class", 
                     ko_to_kegg = FALSE, ### CHANGE ONCE KEGG WORKS
                     p_value_bar = TRUE, 
                     x_lab = "pathway_name")
peb
ggsave("KEGG Error Bar.png",
       plot = peb, width = 18, height = 10)
```

## View Identical Features

```{r Identical Features}
sig_features = daa_annotated_results_df %>% 
  filter(p_adjust < 5e-11, abs(log2FoldChange) > 5) %>% 
  pull('feature') %>% unique()

ko_relab = read.delim('pred_metagenome_unstrat.tsv',row.names = 1) %>% 
  apply(2,function(x) x/sum(x)) %>% as.data.frame()
colSums(ko_relab) # Should be all 1

stats = ko_relab %>% t() %>%  # switch rows and columns
  as.data.frame() %>% # Lets us use select()
  select(all_of(sig_features)) %>% 
  cor(method = 'pearson') #Pearson tests between every feature pair

# Define the color palette
color_palette <- colorRampPalette(c("blue", "white", "red"))(40)

# Define breaks for the color scale
breaks <- seq(-1, 1, length.out = 41)  # 40 colors + 1 for the endpoint

# Create the clustered heatmap with centered color at zero
library('pheatmap')
pheatmap(stats, 
         clustering_distance_rows = "euclidean",  
         clustering_distance_cols = "euclidean", 
         clustering_method = "complete",          
         color = color_palette, 
         breaks = breaks,
         main = '',
         fontsize_row = 10, 
         fontsize_col = 10,
         filename = "KEGG Heatmap.png",
         height= 9, width = 9)
```

## View Sample Similarity

```{r PCA}
pathway_pca(abundance = ko_filt,
            metadata = hindgut, 
            group = "swim_performance")
```

Note that the `echo = FALSE` parameter was added to the code chunk to prevent printing of the R code that generated the plot.
